title: Extended: controlAttestations (v0.1)
description: Audience-neutral attestation of which controls were in effect for the Pack's scope. Multi-framework — one Pack may attest controls across ISO 27001, ISO 42001, NIST 800-53, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act articles, SOC 2 TSC, OWASP LLM mitigations, CIS Controls, or implementer-defined frameworks. controlIds and status enumerations are OPEN — the spec does not lock in framework catalogs. Vocab URIs for common control identifiers are mapped in the JSON-LD @context (see ADR 0002). Carried under the Pack envelope's 'extended.controlAttestations' field.

framework.description: Identifier of the control framework. Conventional: 'iso-27001', 'iso-42001', 'nist-800-53', 'nist-ai-rmf', 'eu-ai-act', 'soc2-tsc', 'owasp-llm-top-10', 'cis-controls'. Open — implementer-defined frameworks (e.g. internal control libraries) are valid.

version.description: Version of the framework (e.g. '2022' for ISO 27001:2022, '5.0' for NIST 800-53 Rev. 5). MAY be omitted when the framework version is implied by 'framework' itself.

controlId.description: Identifier of the control within the framework. Conventional formats: 'A.5.1' (ISO 27001), 'AC-2' (NIST 800-53), 'Article 14' (EU AI Act), 'LLM01' (OWASP LLM Top 10), '5.2' (ISO 42001 clause). The spec does not validate format — the implementer's identifier convention is preserved verbatim.

status.description: Attestation status. Canonical values: 'implemented', 'partial', 'not_implemented', 'not_applicable', 'compensating_control'. Enumeration is OPEN — implementers MAY use other values (e.g. 'not_assessed'), and validators MUST NOT reject solely on unknown values (per ADR 0005).

description.description: Brief description of what the control requires.

evidence.description: Pointers to evidence supporting the attestation. Open shape per item. Conventional fields: 'type' (e.g. 'event_ref', 'document', 'process_record', 'measurement'), 'eventRefs' (array of eventIds in this Pack that demonstrate the control in effect), 'uri', 'hash', 'description'.

assessedAt.description: When this specific control was last assessed. MAY be omitted when covered by the top-level 'attestedAt'.

period.description: Period during which this control was in effect. MAY be a subset of extended.scope.timeWindow (e.g. a control implemented partway through the scope period). 'end' MAY be omitted for controls currently in effect.

exceptions.description: Known deviations or gaps from the control. Open shape per item. Conventional fields: 'description', 'period' ({ start, end }), 'severity', 'compensatingControls' (array of controlId strings within this controlAttestations object that provide compensation).

attestor.description: Who attested this specific control. Open shape. Overrides top-level 'attestor' when present. Use when individual controls are attested by different parties (e.g. internal audit attests SOC 2; external assessor attests ISO 42001 — both in one Pack).

justification.description: Rationale for the attestation, especially for 'not_applicable', 'partial', 'compensating_control', or other non-'implemented' statuses. SHOULD be present whenever 'status' is not 'implemented'.

controls.description: Per-control attestations within this framework. MAY be empty — declaring framework applicability without listing specific controls is permitted but unusual; implementers SHOULD list at least the controls they are claiming.

frameworks.description: Control attestations grouped by framework. Multi-framework — one Pack may carry claims across many frameworks simultaneously.

methodology.description: How the attestation was conducted. Open shape. Conventional fields: 'type' (e.g. 'self-assessment', 'third-party-audit', 'continuous-monitoring'), 'standard' (uri to the methodology, e.g. ISO 17021), 'assessor' (open shape), 'samplingApproach', 'coverage' (e.g. 'exhaustive' / 'subset').

attestedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the overall attestation was performed. SHOULD be ≤ Pack 'issuedAt'. Per-control 'assessedAt' overrides for specific controls.

attestor.description: Top-level attestor — who is attesting these controls. Open shape. Conventional fields: 'type' ('individual', 'organization', 'internal', 'third-party'), 'id', 'name', 'role', 'accreditation'. Per-control 'attestor' overrides for specific controls. MAY be omitted when attestation comes from the Pack issuer (in which case extended.issuer applies).
